creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 210955
patch to update the port

- update 1.043 --> 1.045
Changes:
http://cpansearch.perl.org/src/BDFOY/Module-Extract-Use-1.045/Changes

- "portlint -AC" just warns about non-empty $FreeBSD$ tag.

- Tested with:
12.1-RELEASE-p1 amd64
poudriere 3.3.3
perl 5.30.1
pkg 1.12.0
ssl=base

- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say PASS.
